tools.name: api
tools.description: Execute a GitHub API call using gh api. Supports all HTTP methods (GET, POST, PATCH, PUT, DELETE). Use this as an escape hatch when specific write tools don't cover your use case.

endpoint.description: GitHub API endpoint, relative to https://api.github.com/ (e.g. 'repos/owner/repo/pulls').

fields.description: jq expression for --jq flag on the gh api call.

jq_filter.description: jq expression to filter/transform the output.

max_lines.description: Return only the first N lines of output.

tail_lines.description: Return only the last N lines of output.

fallback.description: Text to return if the gh command fails.
